'''Lord Barthos Okeefe''' was a [[Brentaalan]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] of the prominent [[House Okeefe]] merchant house. He had a long and successful career as a financier and director of Brentaal's orbital [[Brentaal HoloNet relay station|HoloNet relay station]], then retired around the age of sixty to a [[Planet/Legends|planetside]] resort villa on the north pole. Okeefe disliked the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], but had doubts about the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels']] ability to rule in its stead.<ref name="CatCW" />

{{Char-stub}}
